titleStmt.title: SII 23.393: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 393. (A.R. No. 393 of 1907.) Maruttuvakkuḍi, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Airāvatēśvara temple—on the same wall Parak. Tribh. Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 10: 1187 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the introduction Puyal vāyttu vaḷam peruga etc. The details of date are given as Kaṟkaṭaka, śu. 12, Saturday, Mūlam (=A.D. 1187, July 18.)

This records the formation of a village under the name Kulōttuṅgaśōḻaṉ Nyāyaparipāla-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by grouping the several lands purchased from the surrounding villages to the extent of six vēli by Ediriliśōḻaṉ alias Iruṅgōḷaṉ of Śēndamaṅgalam in Neṉmali-nāḍu, a division of Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, who got the royal order for its entry in the uḷvari register before presenting the village to the temple as tirunāmattukkāṇi and ūr-iṟaiyili for providing for worship and repairs in the temple. The land actually under account in the revenue register is said to have measured 5 vēli and odd.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— puyal vāyttu vaḷamperuka poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vā
yppat tirumakaḷuñ ceyamakaḷuñ ciṟantuvāḻa veṇmatipoṟ kuṭai viḷaṅka vel
venta raṭi vaṇaṅka maṇ maṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaitto ṅkac cakkara
muñ ceṅkolum tikkaṉaittuñ cel naṭappa kaṟpakālam puvikākka poṟppamain
ta muṭipuṉaintu vikkirama pāṇṭiyaṉ veṇṭaviṭṭa taṇṭāl vira pāṇṭiyaṉ makaṉ
paṭa Eḻakam paṭa maṟappaṭaiy ciṅkaḷappaṭai mūkkaṟuppuṇ ṭalaikaṭal puka
maturaiyum miṇṭuṅ koṇṭu j[ Eyastam] bham naṭṭu Ammaturaiyum Aracum
nāṭum Aṭainta pāṇṭiyaṟ karuḷi meymmalarnta tiyāka koṭi
yum virakkoṭiyum Eṭuttu cempoṉ virasiṅhāsaṉat
tu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟu Iruntaruḷiya koppara
kecaripanmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ maturai koṇṭaruḷiṉa
śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu kaṟ
kaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu tuvādeśiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyuṅ pe
ṟṟa mūlattu nāḷ Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmali nā
ṭṭu centamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Etirilicoḻanāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉ Uyyak
koṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu Āṉaiccūḻ Uṭaiyār tiruviṭai
kkuḷamuṭaiyār koyil mūlapiruttiyar Āticaṇṭecuratevar śrīpāta ttu pira
māṇa Icaivutiṭṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu Iṉṉāṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ niyāya
paripālac catuppetimaṅkalameṉṉum perāl nāṉ Eṟṟiṉa Akarat tukku Iṉ
ṉāṭṭut tirukkuṭamukkil nāyakanallūrilum Iṉ
ṉāṭṭu vikkiramacoḻac catuppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai tirunilakkuṭiyi lum Iṉ
ṉāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭup piramateyam keraḷāntakaccatuppetimaṅkalattu pala
kaṭṭaḷaikaḷilum Āka palar pakkalilum palarperilum Aṉṉiyanāmat tāl koṇṭa
nilaṅkaḷ viṇṇappañ ceytu Ivakarattu mākak kūṭṭi muṉpu Ivvūr
kaḷil Iṟuttuvarumpaṭi taviṟtu tākavum niyāyapari
pālac caturppetimaṅkalameṉṉum perāl ka niṉaippiliṭuvittu
pirasātañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukamum Uḷvariyum koṇṭu niyāyapari pālac caturp
petimaṅkalattile Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaikkuḷa muṭaiyārkku civaṉā mattukkāṇiyāka
kūṭukiṟa nilam Aṟuveli Iṉṉilam Aṟuveliyum ttu Iv Aṟu velikkum
Ivakarattup pottakappaṭikku viḻukkāṭṭopāti tarampeṟṟa nilam Aiñce Eṭṭu
mākkāṇi Iṉṉilam Aiñce Eṭṭumākkāṇiyum Ivvūrp piṭākai karampai
yāṉa tillaināyakanallūril pakkam kku vaṭakku vaṇṇakkuṭi
kkuk kiḻakku Āṉaiccūḻ Ellaika kaḷālum nilam Aiñce Eṭṭu
mākkāṇiyum Ivvakarattup pottakappaṭi viḻukkāṭṭopāti Eṟṟi vanta viḻukkāṭṭi
ttukkāṇiyāka pottakattu Eṟiṭṭu tirumukamum Uḷvarippa
riṟuttapaṭi Iṟukkavum Ūr Iṟaiyiliyāvutākavum Iṟuttu mikuti pūcaik kum tiruppa
ṇikkum Uṭalāvutākavum Iṉṉilam Añce Eṭṭumākkāṇiyum civaṉā mattukkā
ṇiyāka meṇokkiṉa maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟp paṭṭa Urimaikaḷum
Akappaṭṭa Ippaṭi cammatittu U maiyil niyāya
Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkku Iccentamaṅkalamuṭaiyā
ṉ Etirilicoḻaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaneṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai
Iruṅkoḷaṉeḻuttu pālaivāyiluṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Etirilicoḻa
ṉāṉa vicaiyarāyaṉ varaiyaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ nampūr kāṇi
tukkai tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kuṇṭi
ṉakottira ttapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irāyūrc
coṭṭai ma vapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṅkippuṟattu
caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭa ṉeṉ tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ muṭkaṭṭi
muttapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ muṭkaṭṭi Eññamūrttipaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ kākkunāyakar mātevapaṭṭaneṉ veṉ tūppil
kovintapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ ce śrīmātavapa
ṭṭaṉeṉ I kokkuṇṭur paṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi
veṉ parā
ntūr caṅkaranārāyaṇapaṭṭaneṉ(yeññāya) Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Aiy yakki śrī
mātavapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ jātavedapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟi veṉ ku
ṇṭur tiruveṇkāṭupaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Upālil mahā devapaṭṭa
ṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Irāyūr coṭṭai racapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi
Aṟiveṉ niṉṟaiyil civakuttapaṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
tirapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ Eññavāmaṉapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Iruṅkaṇṭi
viṉāyakapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven mpi civanpaṉai varatapaṭṭaneṉ Ip
paṭi Aṟiveṉ mahādevapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ virupākṣapaṭṭaṉ makaṉ
Akamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṅkipuṟattu mahādeva paṭṭaṉeṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Uyyūr ciṅkappirāṉpaṭṭaṉeṉFive more lines of signatories names which follow a �ehopelessly damaged.
Digital edition of SII 23.393 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
